This is a martial archetype that allows characters to specialize in the mastery of combat skills and techniques.
When choose archetype 3rd you at leveI, this you learn maneuvers are by that fueled special called superiority dice.

Starting 7th level, if you spend at least one minute observing or interacting with another creature outside combat, you can learn certain information about its capabilities compared to your own. The DM tells you whether the creature is equal to, superior to, or inferior to you in regard to those capabilities.
